# Getting Support

Thanks for using Radish 2FA. This page explains where to ask which kind of question.

## Bug or unexpected behavior

Open a [bug report](https://github.com/radishconcepts/radish-wp-2fa/issues/new?template=01-bug-report.yml). Please include WordPress version, PHP version, and reproduction steps — vague reports get closed quickly.

## Feature request

Open a [feature request](https://github.com/radishconcepts/radish-wp-2fa/issues/new?template=02-feature-request.yml). Explain the user problem first, then your proposed solution.

## Security vulnerability

**Do not** open a public issue. Follow [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md) for private disclosure.

## Question or how-to

GitHub issues are for bugs and feature requests. For implementation questions:

- Check the [README](../README.md) — most setup, lockout-recovery, and template-override scenarios are covered there.
- Search [closed issues](https://github.com/radishconcepts/radish-wp-2fa/issues?q=is%3Aissue+is%3Aclosed) — your question may already be answered.
- Open a [GitHub Discussion](https://github.com/radishconcepts/radish-wp-2fa/discussions) if discussions are enabled.

## Commercial support

For paid integration help, custom development, or priority support contracts, contact **support@radishconcepts.com**.
